TITLE_SEO: Jeferson Barrero | Software Engineer, Tech Consultant & Educator
DESCRIPTION_SEO: Software Engineer based in Bogotá with over 3 years of experience in web development, software architecture, and scalable digital solutions. Tech consultant and content creator specializing in programming and technology. I help businesses and startups transform ideas into innovative digital products, optimizing systems and driving growth in the digital world.
KEYWORD_SEO: Software Architecture, Technology Consulting, Web Development, React, Next.js, Performance, Optimization, Digital Transformation
AUTHOR: Jeferson Barrero
INTRO_DETAILS: I develop websites and digital products for companies, businesses, and brands.
From blogs and online stores to web applications and custom systems.
QUOTE_Q: I transform ideas into digital solutions for businesses, brands, and companies. Custom web development, scalable applications, and digital experiences that drive your growth in the online world.
ABOUT_DESC:
My name is Jeferson Barrero, but my friends call me Jef. I started programming at the age of 14 as a self-taught enthusiast, inspired by figures like Freddy Vegas and by exploring the web. This early dive into the fascinating world of programming shaped my journey.

As a PLATZI student and a participant in the 'MisiónTIC2022' project since its pilot phase, backed by the Colombian government and MINTIC, I have built a solid foundation in programming and web development. Actively participating in personal and collaborative projects with clients has been essential to honing my skills as a developer.

Adding to this journey with virtual courses from SENA and my current studies in 3D modeling for industry and administrative assistance, I aim to stand out in the field of web development and programming. My vision includes not only personal growth but also actively contributing to the community. As a contributor on GitHub, I participate in projects aimed at promoting free and open programming education.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Freelance Web Developer
EXPERIENCE.DESCRIPTION: As an independent web developer, I specialize in crafting unique applications for brands and businesses, spanning a full spectrum of needs, from static websites to online stores. My focus is on delivering innovative and functional technological solutions tailored to the specific goals and requirements of each client.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: DISSRETT SAS
EXPERIENCE.DESCRIPTION: In my role, I was responsible for the design and development of web solutions adapted to the client's needs. I performed software analysis to optimize processes and improve the functionality of the applications. I also managed databases, ensuring their integration and availability.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: Eco Star Hotel
EXPERIENCE.DESCRIPTION: Me desempeñe en la gestión documental. Durante este periodo, desempeñe funciones en la clasificación y organizar documentos importantes de la empresa. Además del almacenamiento del archivo más antiguo de la empresa.

EXPERIENCE.TITLE: MisionTIC2022
EXPERIENCE.DESCRIPTION:
My participation in Misión TIC 2022, since its pilot phase in August 2020, was characterized by comprehensive training in web projects with a specific focus on Node.js. Actively collaborating with young individuals from across the country on joint projects not only expanded my technical skills but also provided a valuable experience of nationwide teamwork.

Complementary activities, such as professional talks and the visit to the Entrepreneurs' Park, added significant value to my education. The talks offered enriching perspectives and practical advice, while the park visit provided a tangible insight into the technological needs of the country. These complementary elements enhanced my overall understanding and offered a deeper vision of the practical application of technology in the national context.

ITEMS.TITLE: Frontend Developer Course
ITEMS.DESCRIPTION: I delved into the basics of HTML and CSS, exploring its structure, elements, and CSS properties. I acquired advanced skills in layout and responsive design.

ITEMS.TITLE: Fundamentals of Software Engineering
ITEMS.DESCRIPTION: I explored the basics of electronics, deepened my knowledge of various operating systems and understood the networks that support the operation of the Internet.

ITEMS.TITLE: Git and GitHub Professional Course
ITEMS.DESCRIPTION: I acquired essential knowledge ranging from fundamental concepts to advanced project management. I developed the ability to clone repositories and efficiently manage my projects, both locally and on collaborative platforms such as GitHub.

ITEMS.TITLE: Python Challenge
ITEMS.DESCRIPTION: I followed an optimized path to strengthen my foundation in Python programming, focusing especially on backend development.

SERVICES_MSG: Discover how we can together create the perfect website for your brand or company. Turn your vision into reality today!
TOOLS_TITLE: Integrate the latest technology into your next project

PLANS.TITLE: Personal Blog
PLANS.DESCRIPTION: Create your blog with a simple and attractive design to share content and connect with your audience.
PLANS.PERFECT_FOR: Ideal for bloggers, writers, content creators, or anyone looking to start their blog professionally.
FEATURES: Article section with categories and tags

PLANS.TITLE: Personal Brand or Business
PLANS.DESCRIPTION: Establish your online presence with a professional and optimized website to attract clients.
PLANS.PERFECT_FOR: Entrepreneurs, freelancers, small businesses, and professionals who need a professional website to attract more clients.
FEATURES: Up to 5 custom sections (Home, Services, About Me, Contact, etc.)
Advanced contact form with data validation
Integration with social media (Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.)
SEO optimization to appear on Google

PLANS.TITLE: Online Store
PLANS.DESCRIPTION: Sell products or services online with a functional, secure, and optimized store to receive payments.
PLANS.PERFECT_FOR: Businesses, entrepreneurs, or brands selling products or services that need an efficient online store to manage sales and payments.
FEATURES: Shopping cart and optimized checkout process
Integration with payment gateways (MercadoPago, Strapi, etc.)
Inventory management (if applicable) and stock alerts
Admin panel to view orders and customers

PLANS.TITLE: Custom Plan
PLANS.DESCRIPTION: Tailor-made solutions for businesses with specific needs or more complex projects.
PLANS.PERFECT_FOR: Large companies, startups, or tech projects that require custom functionalities to scale their business.
FEATURES: 100% custom design and development for your brand
Advanced integrations with APIs and external systems
Development of specialized platforms or systems

PLANS.TITLE: Multi-language Support
PLANS.DESCRIPTION: Expand your audience by offering your website in multiple languages with seamless integration.
PLANS.PERFECT_FOR: Businesses, bloggers, and online stores that want to reach international customers.
FEATURES: Integration with Google Translate or custom translations

PLANS.DESCRIPTION: Benefits you get regardless of the plan you choose.
FEATURES: Responsive design adapted for mobile devices
Technical support for the time defined in the plan

BECAUSE.TITLE: Experience
BECAUSE.DESCRIPTION: I've had the chance to share knowledge with tech experts at conferences, talks, and meetups, and I've worked on both client and personal projects.

BECAUSE.TITLE: Exclusive Client Panel
BECAUSE.DESCRIPTION: You'll have access to a portal where you can see real-time progress, download contracts, review implemented features, and track delivery timelines.

BECAUSE.TITLE: Optimized and Responsive Design
BECAUSE.DESCRIPTION: I create modern, attractive, and responsive websites that work smoothly on both computers and mobile devices.

BECAUSE.TITLE: Tailored Packages for Your Business
BECAUSE.DESCRIPTION: I offer flexible and customized plans based on the needs of your business or brand, ensuring you get the best solution for your project.

BECAUSE.TITLE: 🛠️ Continuous Support and Assistance
BECAUSE.DESCRIPTION: I’ll always be available to answer your questions and address any concerns during your project’s development.
